summary: Heavy focus on building a SaaS crypto trading platform with AI features, alongside embedded firmware for ESP32, Windows kernel drivers, and mobile AI assistants.

items.title: ESP32 firmware feature expansion
items.description: Added USB HID fire-and-forget event emitting and an 8x8 matrix variant for the ESP32-S3 emulation firmware.

items.title: Windows input driver improvements
items.description: Iterated on the Windows kernel input filter driver, adding push-style event delivery and safety improvements.

items.title: Android TTS engine integration
items.description: Integrated Piper TTS, built a Vosk voice activity calibration suite, and improved speech synthesis performance.

items.title: E-ink firmware expansion
items.description: Extended the biscuit firmware for e-ink readers with a Knowledge Base app, FB2 reader, and Mesh Chat fixes.

items.title: Trading platform foundations and tools
items.description: Built core infrastructure for a SaaS crypto trading platform, including user proxying, strategy templates, and a full API layer.

items.title: Aim assist utility development
items.description: Worked on a computer vision utility with overlay graphics, aiming logic, and input device emulation.

items.title: ESP32 firmware variant creation
items.description: Developed a new firmware variant for the ESP32-S3 input device emulator.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware build
items.description: Expanded custom firmware with a map app, knowledge base browser, and enhanced book format support.

items.title: Price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted deep research on mixture-of-experts architectures and ensemble methods for a crypto price prediction model.

items.title: Android LLM assistant features
items.description: Built out an on-device LLM assistant with sub-agent delegation, model routing, and tool execution capabilities.

items.title: E-ink Android launcher development
items.description: Developed a note-taking-focused launcher for e-ink devices with gesture navigation and stylus input.

items.title: Aim assist overlay rewrite
items.description: Iterated on a computer vision utility, rewriting the overlay system and adding input persistence.

items.title: File tagging explorer work
items.description: Polished the Windows Explorer file tagging utility, focusing on release automation and Microsoft Store publishing.

items.title: Code intelligence engine development
items.description: Built a graph-powered code analysis engine with language server support and dependency injection detection.

items.title: Neovim environment maintainance
items.description: Updated a personal Neovim configuration setup for IDE-like features and cross-environment compatibility.

items.title: Public repository documentation
items.description: Updated documentation and release materials for a Windows file tagging utility.

items.title: Poker computer vision tool
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for online poker, focusing on automating hand history tracking and state validation.

items.title: Telegram automation node updates
items.description: Maintained a fork of Telegram automation nodes, resolving session bugs and Docker support.

items.title: Android sensor utility tool
items.description: Started an Android sensor data logging utility with visualizations.

items.title: Trading platform server overhaul
items.description: Initiated a major .NET rewrite of the crypto trading platform.

items.title: Firmware feature development
items.description: Developed new firmware versions with BLE/USB device emulation on ESP32.

items.title: Trading bot strategies and tools
items.description: Developed and optimized custom trading strategies for algorithmic trading.

items.title: Telegram trading bot tools
items.description: Built a multi-bot management tool for Telegram trading bots.

items.title: Automated trading signals work
items.description: Worked on an automated trading signal bot with AI-powered analysis features.
